custom_nodes.author: Tsubasa109
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-manga-panel
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI nodes for selecting, generating, and compositing rectangular manga panels

custom_nodes.author: OliverCrosby
custom_nodes.title: Universal Seamless Tiles
custom_nodes.description: Model-agnostic seamless / tileable image generation for ComfyUI — works on transformer/DiT models (Flux, Wan/Anima) as well as convolutional models (SD1.5, SDXL).

custom_nodes.author: rikunarita
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-ModelMergeCosmosPredict-2B-Slerp
custom_nodes.description: Slerp model merging node specifically for Cosmos Predict 2B. Supports layer-wise ratio adjustment.

custom_nodes.author: wraith-executioner-year-2
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-misc
custom_nodes.description: A small utility custom nodes.

custom_nodes.author: VixDreamer
custom_nodes.title: Kontext ControlNet Fix
custom_nodes.description: Runtime patch that fixes the shape-mismatch crash when combining Flux Kontext ReferenceLatent with any ControlNet node. No core files modified. Idempotent — skips if upstream fix (PR #9180) is already present.

custom_nodes.author: shootthesound
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-WorkflowDropZone
custom_nodes.description: A persistent drop zone for loading workflows from images or .json files — a reliable alternative to ComfyUI's built-in drag-and-drop, with crash-recovery snapshots, recents, favorites, paste and append.

custom_nodes.author: gregowahoo
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Workflow Group Navigator
custom_nodes.description: Floating panel that lists every group in your ComfyUI workflow — jump to any group, toggle on/off via rgthree Fast Groups Muter, reorder via drag-and-drop, configurable keyboard shortcuts. Designed for large multi-stage workflows.

custom_nodes.author: Azornes
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Model Resolver
custom_nodes.description: Automatically resolves missing models in ComfyUI workflows using intelligent local fuzzy matching, online search, direct downloads, background download tracking, and in-place workflow updates.

custom_nodes.author: CovertBannana
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-ImagePlus
custom_nodes.description: Unified nodes pack primarily for Image to Image generation with a toggleable Text to Image option for easy switch back. CivitAI and local image inspection.

custom_nodes.author: luminatrix
custom_nodes.title: Lumina_NIVR2
custom_nodes.description: Native ComfyUI implementation of ByteDance SeedVR2 using ComfyUI's own model stack and core graph nodes.

custom_nodes.author: TiwazM
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Precision-Model-Save
custom_nodes.description: For users who merge models in ComfyUI and want the saved checkpoint to match the live merged model exactly. A small custom node for saving a live merged MODEL without using ComfyUI's normal ModelSave materialisation path.

custom_nodes.author: CocyNoric
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Anima-TeaCache
custom_nodes.description: TeaCache acceleration for the native ComfyUI implementation of circlestone-labs/Anima.

custom_nodes.author: Yasei-no-otoko
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI RDNA35 Attention
custom_nodes.description: RDNA 3.5 attention research nodes for ComfyUI, including fixed-block, exact Triton, FlexAttention, and PISA paths with model-local fallback handling.

custom_nodes.author: 90-RED
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-LinkRouter
custom_nodes.description: Object-avoiding orthogonal link routing for ComfyUI. Links automatically detour around nodes with smooth right-angle paths. Flow animation, hover highlight, floating control bar, and full settings panel. Pure frontend — zero impact on generation.

custom_nodes.author: cyberdelia
custom_nodes.title: NegPiP Prompt (Multi-Model)
custom_nodes.description: One-node NegPiP prompting for Z-Image, SD1, SDXL, and Anima in ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: smthemex
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI_UniBlockSwap
custom_nodes.description: A universal swap node that supports ComfyUI native workflow, allowing 4_6G users to experience Klein9B or other large models

custom_nodes.author: RmaNMetaverse
custom_nodes.title: First Frame & Last Frame Extractor
custom_nodes.description: Extract the first and last frame from any video file or image batch in ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: galigali
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-PNGInfo
custom_nodes.description: A1111-style PNG Info for ComfyUI: load an image, read its generation metadata as human-readable text (A1111 parameters and ComfyUI embedded workflows), and reuse positive/negative/seed/steps/cfg as typed outputs.

custom_nodes.author: YOUR_COMFY_PUBLISHER_ID
custom_nodes.title: Undulating Glitch
custom_nodes.description: Four-way alignment, travelling wave, and block-glitch video compositor nodes for ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: nnegret
custom_nodes.title: Anima-Tools
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI nodes for anime prompt selection, random prompt generation, background and character tag composition, and Anima LoRA search, download, and loading.

custom_nodes.author: ukr8b3g-cmyk
custom_nodes.title: Empty Latent Image Plus
custom_nodes.description: A compact Empty Latent Image replacement that also outputs WIDTH and HEIGHT values for ComfyUI workflows.

custom_nodes.author: KoishiAI
custom_nodes.title: LD ComfyUI Prompt Nodes
custom_nodes.description: Contains SlopPrompt and BooruPromptGenerator nodes to automate prompt generation for anime models. SlopPrompt allows natural language prompt generation or advanced formats like json and various conversions between them, while BooruPromptGenerator will let you generate random prompts anchored around tags you specify with various sampling options.

custom_nodes.author: TrophiHunter
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-MLUT
custom_nodes.description: Apply color **LUTs** and **swatches/palettes** to images in ComfyUI from one self-contained collection.

custom_nodes.author: albert999-pixel
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-beeble-switchx
custom_nodes.description: Custom ComfyUI nodes for Beeble SwitchX image and video workflows.

custom_nodes.author: WaitWut
custom_nodes.title: Ultimate Lora Loader
custom_nodes.description: A Power-Lora-Loader-style dynamic LoRA stack node with a real on-disk folder browser, drag-to-reorder, optional CLIP, and per-lora split model/clip strengths.

custom_nodes.author: m0rtus59
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-ComfySidebar
custom_nodes.description: Restoring the ComfyUI frontend pre-vue update queue functionality, drag&drop support, quicksave, and more in a clean design that respects your screen area.

custom_nodes.author: Anonymzx
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Supertonic3TTS
custom_nodes.description: custom nodes integrating Supertone's Supertonic-3 — a lightning-fast, on-device, multilingual Text-to-Speech system running natively via ONNX Runtime.

custom_nodes.author: vitacon
custom_nodes.title: Retro Pixel-Matrix Dither 👾
custom_nodes.description: An advanced multi-ratio Bayer matrix dithering node for ComfyUI with edge protection.

custom_nodes.author: navalyalgam97
custom_nodes.title: XFlow Resolution
custom_nodes.description: A premium resolution utility node for ComfyUI with aspect ratio grid, preset selection, custom ratios, favorites, recents, and keyboard navigation.

custom_nodes.author: kongo_jun
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-JITBlockSwap
custom_nodes.description: Block Swap (RAM Offload) node for native ComfyUI MODEL - run DiT models larger than VRAM by streaming transformer blocks from system RAM.

custom_nodes.author: nkxx188
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Krea2 Style Transfer
custom_nodes.description: Training-free Krea2 style reference nodes for ComfyUI, with LoRA-like single-image transfer, experimental two-reference blending, low content leakage, and preserved image quality.

custom_nodes.author: r0zaic
custom_nodes.title: Reference Image Comparer
custom_nodes.description: Compare your workflow's output against a fixed reference image with a hover swipe slider.

custom_nodes.author: shootthesound
custom_nodes.title: Krea Reason
custom_nodes.description: Reason-then-encode for Krea 2. The encoder's own Qwen3-VL rewrites your prompt into a richer one — or reads a reference image (describe → filter → combine) — before conditioning: a built-in prompt enhancer and language-level image reference, running on the exact model that conditions.

custom_nodes.author: fni8
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-fni8 (int8 dp4a / Volta)
custom_nodes.description: int8 dp4a (sm_70/Volta) acceleration for diffusion DiTs in ComfyUI, over the fni8 kernels

custom_nodes.author: inubq8
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-MultiMaskOps
custom_nodes.description: A collection of ComfyUI nodes for working with multiple masks at once — sorting them by position, picking one out, removing duplicates, and expanding/feathering them without letting neighbours overlap.

custom_nodes.author: SheikhAnas999
custom_nodes.title: Image Grid Merger
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom node that merges a batch of images into a single grid canvas.

custom_nodes.author: younestft
custom_nodes.title: Comfy EverAnimate
custom_nodes.description: Native ComfyUI nodes for EverAnimate-style chunked WanAnimate workflows, including master/chunk settings, chunk calculation, image carry-over, and boundary color correction.

custom_nodes.author: Moon-NE
custom_nodes.title: MoonNe_Nodes
custom_nodes.description: Custom nodes for text operations, including concatenation, horizontal-to-vertical conversion, and batch processing.

custom_nodes.author: TechnoWarrior2
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Image Picker
custom_nodes.description: Pauses your workflow and opens a popup window to manually pick which generated images pass through to the rest of the graph.

custom_nodes.author: TechnoWarrior2
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Live Preview
custom_nodes.description: Displays a large draggable floating window with live denoising step previews as your image generates, similar to A1111 and Forge.

custom_nodes.author: shootthesound
custom_nodes.title: Lighthouse
custom_nodes.description: A non-destructive overlay that lights up every node by graph distance from the one you click. Diagnostic for big workflows, educational for understanding workflows others built, and surgical when you need to focus on one neighbourhood at a time.

custom_nodes.author: shootthesound
custom_nodes.title: CleanFreak
custom_nodes.description: One-click tidy-by-role for any ComfyUI workflow — loaders, encoders, samplers, decoders, and outputs each sorted into their own column with coloured group cards and connections preserved. 1200+ node classes pre-classified out of the box.

custom_nodes.author: shootthesound
custom_nodes.title: Finding LoRA
custom_nodes.description: A LoRA loader with bookmarks, trigger-word storage and click-to-copy, fuzzy search, and a one-click button to drop another loader inline and wire it into the model chain automatically.

custom_nodes.author: shootthesound
custom_nodes.title: Image of the Day
custom_nodes.description: Fetch a fresh image straight into your workflow from 8 daily/random sources. Useful for prompt testing, style references, daily-image automations, or just kicking off a workflow with something interesting.

custom_nodes.author: boobkake22
custom_nodes.title: Sampling Planner
custom_nodes.description: Task-aware Wan 2.2 sampling plans and sampler-specific breakout nodes for ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: iljung1106
custom_nodes.title: Anima Safe PAG
custom_nodes.description: A soft, Anima-friendly Perturbed Attention Guidance node for ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: burgstall-labs
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Domemaster-Outpaint
custom_nodes.description: Outpaint flat video into fulldome / planetarium shows: domemaster rendering with tilted-venue presets for ComfyUI, on top of the Burgstall Labs 360 outpaint pipeline.

custom_nodes.author: depth-layer-rasterizer
custom_nodes.title: Depth Layer Rasterizer
custom_nodes.description: Depth-map paper-cut and parallax layer rasterizer for ComfyUI

custom_nodes.author: artokun
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Agent Panel
custom_nodes.description: Agent sidebar panel for ComfyUI — chat with an autonomous agent (Claude, Codex/GPT, Gemini, or local Ollama) that builds, runs, and debugs workflows on your live canvas. UI-only pack (also on the Comfy Registry as comfyui-agent-panel); pairs with the comfyui-mcp orchestrator: npx -y comfyui-mcp@latest --panel-orchestrator

custom_nodes.author: designloves2
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-TJ_NODE_STUDIO_ONE
custom_nodes.description: One-node studio UI package for Z-Image Turbo, Flux.2 Klein, Qwen Image Edit 2511, and Krea 2 workflows, including T2I, I2I, inpaint, outpaint, edit, faceswap, angle, and upscale modes.

custom_nodes.author: A1-multiply
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI LatentSaver
custom_nodes.description: Save and reload ComfyUI latent tensors from the output folder.

custom_nodes.author: trix7111
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-TrixNodes
custom_nodes.description: An elegant, premium, remote bypass and wire-management nodes suite for ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: CoreyCorza
custom_nodes.title: Corza LoRA Loader (Clean)
custom_nodes.description: A drop-in ComfyUI LoRA loader with optional spectral cleanup (energy trimming + hot-layer taming) to reduce artifacts from stacked LoRAs and turbo/distilled models.

custom_nodes.author: archerkattri
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-HiCache
custom_nodes.description: Training-free Hunyuan3D shape-generation acceleration: skip DiT steps and forecast the flow-matching velocity instead (HiCache Hermite / HiCache++ DMD, via hicache-pp). Pairs with kijai/ComfyUI-Hunyuan3DWrapper.

custom_nodes.author: archerkattri
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-TRELLIS2-HiCache
custom_nodes.description: Training-free TRELLIS.2 image-to-3D acceleration: forecast the flow-matching velocity on skipped DiT steps (HiCache Hermite / HiCache++ DMD, via hicache-pp) across the sparse-structure and shape-SLaT stages (texture optional). ~2x faster, near-lossless. Pairs with visualbruno/ComfyUI-Trellis2.

custom_nodes.author: Stillfront
custom_nodes.title: SF ComfyUI Nodes
custom_nodes.description: Custom nodes for ComfyUI including LLM Chat (Claude, Gemini, GPT), WaveSpeed AI image and video generation, VertexAI integration, and workflow utilities.

custom_nodes.author: maikios
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Gemma4 Reference Prompt
custom_nodes.description: Gemma 4 reference-image prompt nodes for ComfyUI

custom_nodes.author: ashen3
custom_nodes.title: Two-Stage Sampler and Krea 2 Resolution Picker
custom_nodes.description: Sigma-locked two-stage sampler and dual resolution selector for Krea 2 (and possibly other) workflows in ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: DutchyDutch
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Local Wildcards
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI local wildcard text expansion node with support for .txt, .json, .yaml, and .yml wildcard files, plus Dynamic Prompts-style syntax.

custom_nodes.author: Kevin Gilper
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Krea Reference
custom_nodes.description: Give each reference image a job before it reaches Krea 2. Guide cards assign per-image roles (keep the same subject, suggest the visual style, copy lighting or pose, big shapes only, avoid copying text/logos) and the stack encoder builds Krea conditioning with per-card strength, per-layer gains, and guarded prompt handling.

custom_nodes.author: monja
custom_nodes.title: Monja Image Validator
custom_nodes.description: Valida se a imagem é múltipla de 8 para workflows de Upscale e Flux.

custom_nodes.author: workordie
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-GridSplit
custom_nodes.description: Auto-detect seams in stitched grid/carousel/collage images and split into panels — no model, any resolution, even/uneven/irregular layouts.

custom_nodes.author: lhy666
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-TomatoCrypt
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI expansion of the 🍅Tomato Crypt

custom_nodes.author: y4236512
custom_nodes.title: Wan Camera Advanced
custom_nodes.description: Native-compatible 6DoF camera paths, chaining, visualization, and multi-frame reference conditioning for ComfyUI Wan video workflows

custom_nodes.author: g-raw
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-LTX-Attention-Toolkit
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI custom node suite for profiling, visualizing and steering attention heads in LTX-Video 2.3 (distill & dev).

custom_nodes.author: ketle-man
custom_nodes.title: Mask Editor One
custom_nodes.description: A layer-based modal mask editor for ComfyUI with Photoshop-like controls. Features paint, color selection, alpha extraction, vector (Catmull-Rom spline), shape, and text tools, SAM3 AI segmentation, BiRefNet background removal, layer management with Undo/Redo (30 levels), ABR brush import, brush library, and multilingual UI (en/ja/zh).

custom_nodes.author: File_xor
custom_nodes.title: SEGA for Anima
custom_nodes.description: SEGA anima is implementation of "SEGA: Spectral-Energy Guided Attention for Resolution Extrapolation in Diffusion Transformers" (arXiv:2605.22668) for Anima model in ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: beakfx
custom_nodes.title: MBQ Wedge
custom_nodes.description: Compare ComfyUI parameter values without contact sheets — sweep numerics, samplers, or schedulers, then inspect each result full-res in MBQ Viewer.

custom_nodes.author: nekodificador
custom_nodes.title: NKD Preview Tools
custom_nodes.description: Preview and masking tools for ComfyUI: floating popup preview window (multi-monitor, live TAESD preview) and a procedural mask painter that bridges any IMAGE source into the native mask editor.

custom_nodes.author: ruminar
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-GMImageSaver
custom_nodes.description: GraphicsMagick-based direct JPEG saver node for ComfyUI. Saves IMAGE tensors directly as JPEG without intermediate PNG files. JPEG-only, previewless, label-aware, and useful for organized batch/inventory workflows. NOTE: GraphicsMagick must be installed separately and available via GM_PATH or PATH.

custom_nodes.author: EnragedAntelope
custom_nodes.title: EA_LMStudio
custom_nodes.description: LM Studio ComfyUI integration with easy model selection and many optimizations! Features auto model discovery, vision/VLM support, reasoning extraction for DeepSeek R1/Qwen3/QwQ models, and detailed stats with VRAM management.

custom_nodes.author: sorryhyun
custom_nodes.title: Anima Block Compile
custom_nodes.description: Anima Block Compile for ComfyUI: a one-purpose node that runs torch.compile on the Anima DiT per transformer block (diffusion_model.blocks.{i}) instead of the whole model. Faster compile, fewer graph breaks. A thin, Anima-named wrapper over ComfyUI core's set_torch_compile_wrapper.

custom_nodes.author: nynxz
custom_nodes.title: NK2E
custom_nodes.description: NK2E — experimental, unofficial in-context image editing for Krea 2 (community project; not affiliated with Krea).

custom_nodes.author: glashkoff
custom_nodes.title: Random Seed Batch Generator
custom_nodes.description: Generate multiple groups of seeds for batch image processing in ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: bonestudio
custom_nodes.title: Bone-Studio Workflow Manager
custom_nodes.description: Organize your ComfyUI workflows for production: a folder manager plus a project layer (exportable internal DB), bulk export and optional Git versioning, from a built-in panel.

custom_nodes.author: andrometa
custom_nodes.title: Krea Moodboards
custom_nodes.description: Prompt-only Krea moodboard search and style nodes for ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: tylervw99
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-camera-shake-node
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI custom node that applies subtle, handheld-style camera shake to an image batch. It adds per-frame affine transforms (translate, rotate, scale) to simulate natural micro-movement, ideal for adding life to video/animation frame sequences.

custom_nodes.author: judian17
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-JoyAI-Image-Edit
custom_nodes.description: Native ComfyUI implementation of the JoyAI-Image family supporting single and multi-image image editing and text-to-image generation using JoyAI-Image models with Qwen3-VL support.

custom_nodes.author: dugdiamond6-afk

custom_nodes.description: A simple scaling node for ComfyUI, allowing the changing of the length of the input's longest edge.

custom_nodes.author: julienpmorand

custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI Dynamic Pipe is a lightweight custom node extension that lets you bundle multiple arbitrary node connections into a single pipe connection, then unpack them later.

custom_nodes.author: Sekiun
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-fusenchatPrompter
custom_nodes.description: Custom node for converting metadata-enriched PNG images from fusenchat into ComfyUI prompt text chips with drag-and-drop reordering capabilities.

custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI conditioning node for reference-conditioned Ideogram 4 LoRAs. Enables inpainting with the Ideogram 4 model.

custom_nodes.description: An extraction of the one node I actually wanted from ComfyUI_essentials

custom_nodes.description: Wire Loom nodes for organizing and bundling wires in ComfyUI workflows into reusable streams. (Description by CC)

custom_nodes.description: Generates dynamic combo/dropdown choices from multiline text inputs compatible with Set/Get node setups.

custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI custom node that automatically extracts KSampler metadata and stamps it onto generated images.

custom_nodes.author: nova452

custom_nodes.description: Conditioning optimizer nodes with per layer weighting that offers IP-Adapter-like features for Krea 2 image reference editing along with bypassing the built in quality diluation from the trained safety filter and also works as a means to unfilter the model.

custom_nodes.author: bradsec

Modes: fixed, increment, or random over a start..end slice, with index/seed control_after_generate to step roles across a batch. Roles are plain Markdown files in roles/; add a .md file and restart to add a role. Node name: Set Role. Located under Add Node > LLM.

custom_nodes.description: JoyAI-Image-Edit (16B MMDiT + Qwen3-VL-8B) instruction image editing for ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: surrealbydesign
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Ideogram Palette and Prompt Tools
custom_nodes.description: Extract color palettes from reference images and assemble/validate/embed Ideogram 4's structured prompt JSON.

custom_nodes.author: ukr8b3g-cmyk
custom_nodes.title: Anima Regional Canvas
custom_nodes.description: ANIMA-focused regional canvas node for Anima-LLLite Regional ControlNet workflows in ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: bnwa
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Latent Presets
custom_nodes.description: Model-scoped latent presets for ComfyUI

custom_nodes.author: bradsec
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI_RandomPerson
custom_nodes.description: Generate randomised, structured physical person descriptions for image-generation prompts. Sex-aware traits, per-category random/allow_list/fixed/off modes, age ranges, body details, and individual output pins. Full node plus Identity, Face, Hair, Body, and Style segment nodes under the Random Person menu category.

custom_nodes.author: bradsec
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI_OllamaUnload
custom_nodes.description: Unload one or all Ollama models mid-workflow to free VRAM before image sampling. Wire your prompt through the passthrough socket so the node runs before the sampler. Node name: Ollama Unload (free VRAM). Located under Add Node > Ollama.

custom_nodes.author: mooshieblob
custom_nodes.title: Mooshie Tiled Diffusion
custom_nodes.description: MultiDiffusion and SpotDiffusion tiled diffusion for ComfyUI, with Anima (COSMOS) 5D latent support.

custom_nodes.author: ethanfel
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Lora-Sweeper
custom_nodes.description: Sweep a folder of LoRA training epochs: pick a step range + stride and sample one image per epoch from a single queue.

custom_nodes.author: enragedantelope
custom_nodes.title: Identity Forge
custom_nodes.description: A 70+ field character randomizer node pack for ComfyUI with a constraint engine, themed archetype presets with varying costumes, and dual prose/JSON output.

custom_nodes.author: bulldog68
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI_FMJ_LLMP
custom_nodes.description: Generate random prompts easily for FMJ using TXT files (1 prompt per file).

custom_nodes.author: cyberdelia
custom_nodes.title: Anima Resolutions
custom_nodes.description: Anima-friendly first-pass resolution picker for ComfyUI. Outputs resolution, width, and height integers for image generation workflows.

custom_nodes.author: monkeykim111
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-image-safety-gate
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom node combining SmilingWolf WD EVA02 Large Tagger v3 (anime rating) and CompVis stable-diffusion-safety-checker (CLIP) with boolean OR for illustration-friendly NSFW detection.

custom_nodes.author: lebensignal
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Ultimate SD Upscale FLS LLLite
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI Ultimate SD Upscale nodes with FLS tile sampling and optional Anima LLLite tile repair.

custom_nodes.author: smai-lee
custom_nodes.title: Lee-RIFE
custom_nodes.description: Fast, GPU-batched RIFE frame interpolation for ComfyUI with working bidirectional ensemble in fp16/32. Self-contained, weights bundled, no extra dependencies.

custom_nodes.author: ruminar
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-CheckpointHandpickerSuite
custom_nodes.description: Review-first checkpoint cycling and handpicking suite for ComfyUI. Auto-cycle checkpoints, review generated images, tag checkpoints, and export cleanup scripts without deleting files immediately.

custom_nodes.author: ketle-man
custom_nodes.title: PSD Figure Creator
custom_nodes.description: Load PSD files, rig layers with interactive R / MR / SW control points, and composite as IMAGE + MASK. Supports setup/pose modes, model/pose library, background options, and i18n (ja/en/zh).

custom_nodes.author: shootthesound
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Angelo
custom_nodes.description: Click-to-refine sampler. Generate, then click or paint regions to refine them in place. First-class support for FLUX 2 Klein 9B and Qwen-Image-Edit (Smart Inpaint / Smart Guided Inpaint / Xtra-Fine), works with any sampler-compatible model for Refine + Area Prompt. Optional SAM 3 Detect for text-prompted segmentation, and a companion Overrides node for custom samplers (power-sigma, Flux 2 scheduler, NAG).

custom_nodes.author: shootthesound
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-SequentialImageLoader
custom_nodes.description: Load a folder of images one at a time, in order — a fresh image on every Queue. Natural sort, filetype picker, reverse, subfolders, hold/pause, scrub bar, folder browser, and current/next previews.

custom_nodes.author: pooria98
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Config-Presets
custom_nodes.description: Preset nodes to save and use prompt and sampler settings presets for different models.

custom_nodes.author: verqqa
custom_nodes.title: PromptNodethingLD
custom_nodes.description: Cinematic AI prompt node for LTX video. Three-pass pipeline: Choreography pre-pass, main generation, lint + auto-repair. Supports Windows, Linux, macOS via llama.cpp (Gemma 4 26B).

custom_nodes.author: vantang
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI MediaHub
custom_nodes.description: Connect cloud image and video generation APIs to composable ComfyUI workflows.

custom_nodes.author: elowbe
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-save-text
custom_nodes.description: API friendly save text to file.

custom_nodes.author: hypnichorse
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Hypnodes
custom_nodes.description: Procedural Multi-character framework & character library with smart-injection technology.

custom_nodes.author: rookiestar28
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-LongCat-Avatar
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom nodes for LongCat Video Avatar 1.5 audio-driven human video generation.
